summary: Terms page successfully implements the diner aesthetic with proper palette, typography, and layout. All core legal content requirements are met with effective date, section headings, and support contact. Minor polish opportunities exist but no blocking violations.

violations.description: Some body text appears to use a gray tone that may not be from the approved muted ink ramp (#4b4640, #3f3a34, #2d2925)

actions: Verify all body text uses only the approved muted ink ramp colors from M.palette.14
Consider increasing contrast on any supporting text that appears too light
